text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. Two main tasks are image recognition, where a computer identifies what an image shows, like a cat or a tree, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image, such as finding all pedestrians in a photo. These technologies have many real-world applications. For example, self-driving cars rely heavily on computer vision to detect road signs, other vehicles, and obstacles. This allows them to navigate safely. Other uses include facial recognition for security and medical imaging to help doctors diagnose diseases.
